info.title: Fatafat Sewa API
info.description: API documentation for the Fatafat Sewa e-commerce application.

get.description: Fetches all dynamic data required to render the homepage, including SEO metadata, JSON-LD, main banners, side banners, category products, dynamic promotional sections, and latest articles.

Custom_code.description: Structured data for search engines (Organization and WebSite)

side_banner.description: Side banners placed next to the main carousel

get.description: Fetches the current event banner details and the featured products for the event section on the homepage.
Get all shipping addresses for the authenticated user.

post.description: Create a new shipping address. The address can be created either from GPS/map selection (with lat/lng coordinates) or manual entry (without coordinates).

get.description: Fetches detailed information about a single product including its variants, reviews, and related products.

data.name: OnePlus 15 (16GBRAM + 512GB Storage)
data.short_description: Flagship killer with Snapdragon 8 Elite and 165Hz Display.
data.description: The OnePlus 15 sets a new benchmark in mobile technology...

get.description: Searches for products based on a query string, returning product matches along with autocomplete suggestions and semantic keywords.
Retrieves a paginated list of products for a specific category, including SEO metadata and category details.

200.description: Category Products with Pagination and Meta

category.name: Smartphones
category.description: Latest mobile phones from top brands

meta.title: Buy Smartphones Online in Nepal
meta.description: Shop the latest smartphones at the best prices.

selected_variant.description: Name of the selected variant, e.g. Red
Name of the selected variant, e.g. Red

post.description: Creates a new order with the selected products, shipping address, and payment method.

full_name.description: Full name of the person placing the order

variant_id.description: ID of the selected variant, if applicable

shipping_address_id.description: ID of the saved shipping address

recipient.description: Recipient information based on recipient type (self, gift, or anonymous)

self_phone.description: Phone number if recipient_type is 'self'. Allows user to specify order-specific contact.

gift_recipient_name.description: Recipient name if this is a gift order

gift_recipient_phone.description: Recipient phone if this is a gift order

get.description: Retrieves a list of orders for the authenticated user.
Retrieves detailed information about a specific order.
Retrieves a list of blog posts with pagination.

200.description: A paginated list of blog posts

data.title: How to build a secure API
data.summary: A comprehensive guide on API security best practices.
data.author: Jane Smith
